recommendations.name: Stone Diffuser
recommendations.description: Hand-finished porcelain essential oil diffuser. Whisper-quiet. Doubles as décor.
recommendations.whyThisFits: Lisa's wellness journey includes yoga practice, and this hand-finished porcelain diffuser creates the perfect atmosphere for both her yoga sessions and daily relaxation rituals. The minimalist design aligns with her aesthetic sense, making it both functional wellness support and beautiful home décor.
recommendations.giftAngle: Present it as creating the perfect ambiance for her yoga practice and evening wind-down routine
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'I see how you create sacred space for yourself through yoga and wellness, and I want to help make that space even more beautiful and nurturing.'
recommendations.usageSignal: She'll turn it on every evening when the day winds down

recommendations.name: 6-Month Gift Subscription
recommendations.description: Curated book subscription — pick one new hardcover each month from five expert selections.
recommendations.whyThisFits: Lisa loves reading, and this six-month subscription means she'll think of you every month when her new book arrives. It's a gift that keeps giving throughout the year, supporting her love of literature with expertly curated selections she might not have discovered otherwise.
recommendations.giftAngle: Frame it as six months of literary discoveries, with each book chosen just for her
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'I know how much joy reading brings you, and I want to be part of that journey by bringing new stories into your world every month.'
recommendations.usageSignal: A new book every month, chosen just for them

recommendations.name: Pure Silk Pillowcase (Queen)
recommendations.description: 22-momme pure mulberry silk — reduces hair friction, prevents sleep creases, feels luxuriously cool. The OG beauty sleep upgrade.
recommendations.whyThisFits: This is an unexpected wellness upgrade that connects to her self-care journey in a way she might not have considered. The luxury of silk supports both beauty sleep and overall wellness, showing you think about her comfort even in the smallest daily moments.
recommendations.giftAngle: Present it as the ultimate sleep upgrade that supports her wellness routine from bedtime to morning
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'Your wellness matters to me in every detail, even the ones you don't think about – I want you to feel pampered and cared for every single night.'
recommendations.usageSignal: Once she sleeps on silk, she'll never go back to cotton

recommendations.name: Organic Cotton Pullover Shirt
recommendations.description: The Organic Cotton Pullover Shirt is a versatile everyday essential made with original organic cotton fabric from Japan’s Nishiwaki City. It offers a smooth texture and durable construction that softens over time. This long-sleeved pullover shirt features a classic button-down collar and large doubl
recommendations.whyThisFits: Sam's minimalist aesthetic will love this clean, understated organic cotton design - it's the kind of comfortable, refined piece that works perfectly for jamming sessions or casual hangouts without any fuss.
recommendations.giftAngle: Perfect for those long practice sessions or when you're just relaxing with your guitar.
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'I know you appreciate quality and simplicity, and I want you to be comfortable while pursuing your passion.'
recommendations.usageSignal: He'll reach for this shirt regularly during his guitar practice sessions and casual days

recommendations.name: Fern + Moss XL 3-Wick Candle
recommendations.description: TOP NOTES: Sage, Lavender MIDDLE NOTES: Spruce, Pine BASE NOTE: Oakmoss A scent for nature lovers inspired by the dewy and beautiful Fe
recommendations.whyThisFits: The earthy, natural scent of sage and pine creates the perfect ambiance for Sam's guitar sessions while fitting his minimalist home aesthetic - it's functional luxury that enhances his creative space.
recommendations.giftAngle: Something to set the mood for your next practice session or when you want to create the perfect atmosphere at home.
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'I want to help create the perfect environment where your creativity can flourish.'
recommendations.usageSignal: He'll light this during evening guitar sessions and quiet moments at home, creating a ritual around his music

recommendations.name: Flat Pyper Bracelet, Gold Vermeil
recommendations.description: The Flat Pyper Bracelet, is slimmer, sleeker version of our classic Pyper Puff. This piece brings handcrafted detailing to the classic mariner puff chain, resulting in a modern look that's finished in polished gold vermeil
recommendations.whyThisFits: This sleek, nautical-inspired bracelet has the clean lines Sam appreciates as a minimalist, and as a musician, he'll love how it won't interfere with his guitar playing while adding a subtle touch of everyday elegance.
recommendations.giftAngle: A piece that's refined enough for any occasion but won't get in the way when you're playing.
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'I see the artist in you and want to give you something beautiful that becomes part of who you are.'
recommendations.usageSignal: He'll wear this daily, becoming part of his signature look whether he's performing or just living life

recommendations.name: Smoky Old Fashioned Set
recommendations.description: Premium ingredient set for smoky Old Fashioneds — Canadian bitters, syrups, and garnishes. Just add whiskey.
recommendations.whyThisFits: Since she loves hosting dinner parties, this premium cocktail set gives her everything needed to craft sophisticated drinks for her guests. The smoky Old Fashioned is an elevated classic that pairs perfectly with dinner entertaining.
recommendations.giftAngle: Position this as the missing piece for her hosting repertoire - now she can offer guests a perfectly crafted cocktail.
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'I appreciate your attention to detail in hosting and want to help you create memorable moments for your guests.'
recommendations.usageSignal: She'll use this to impress guests at every dinner party - becomes part of her hosting signature

recommendations.name: Rambler 20oz Tumbler
recommendations.description: Indestructible insulated tumbler. Keeps hot drinks hot, cold drinks cold. Everyone needs one.
recommendations.whyThisFits: A thoughtful practical pick for your boss that shows you put real thought into this.
recommendations.giftAngle: Give it with a note about why you picked this one specifically for them.
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'I want to show my appreciation for your boss's leadership and acknowledge her re'

recommendations.name: Easy Build Closed Terrarium Kit
recommendations.description: DIY closed terrarium with live moss and everything included. Self-sustaining ecosystem in a glass jar.
recommendations.whyThisFits: While she loves traditional art, this DIY terrarium introduces her to living art — creating a self-sustaining ecosystem in glass. It's a different kind of creativity that bridges art and science, letting her design and build something beautiful that grows and changes.
recommendations.giftAngle: A different kind of art project — creating a tiny, self-sustaining world in glass that she designs and builds herself.
recommendations.whatThisSays: This says: 'I love seeing you create, and I thought you might enjoy exploring creativity in an unexpected way.'
recommendations.usageSignal: Build it once, then watch it thrive and evolve on her desk or windowsill
